reviews_data.review_text: I drive from Lenoir to dine here.  The staff is extremely friendly and I always feel welcomed.  Food is great and the pastries are delicious, especially with a cup of their coffee.  Relaxing atmosphere for conversation with friends or just time on your computer.

This is such a great spot! I started getting their coffee, and it doesn't miss at all! Always on point! 👌🏼I also appreciate how they listen and made it less sweet or to your preference and it still comes out perfectly! 🙌🏼 Coffee is awesome to me because I love dark coffee!!

Also has their breakfast sandwiches, and it's so good! And for a big, decent size too!

Last but not least, the staff are awesome! They greet you and make you feel like you're right at home. Super helpful and friendly! I really appreciate that! Never had an issue. 🤗 My mornings are so much better going here.
Great people and wonderful food.  Our new favorite place!
The spaghetti noodles look handmade. The cannelonis were the best Italian dish I've had in years. The tiramisu was amazing

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: Amazing spacious cafe! BUT very hard parking and I went on a Tuesday! The latte was watery for both me and my sister’s latte but I blame it on the barista putting the shot after the ice. The espresso is very strong! We got the beef empanada and it was very fresh and hot! We will be coming back again to support a small business even though it’s a bit pricy.
Truly the best - Empanadas and soup are my go to.  But if they have any Guava pastries, you have to try those too!
awesome South American pastries. Alfajores was incredible.

I have tried so many things from this Cafe and I have not been disappointed once!
4/8/26 update:
I eloped this week and knew I could count Elena's to have good food and a good cake or pastry. I brought 4 out of the 6 people with me had never been. They loved the food and the prices.  One friend kept ordering pastries 🤣 my now husband and I had a delicious little cake for our little wedding cake ❤️ thank you to your staff for being so sweet.
Great place for lunch and just to sit down for coffe.
Excellent place to try Argentine food!

I wish  people understand  that there's nothing authentic argentinian about this  place. I've been married to a beautiful Argentinian  woman and have the pleasure to visit and know people who really cook and know the Argentinian food.  We tried this Elena's place couple of times, the food is not fresh, the prices are crazy and the service  is terrible.  We just give it a try  this week  and the sandwiches of miga are old ,not fresh and for sure not made on the spot like they advertised they do, on top of that after calling and complaining,  they argued about why they felt and tasted like that, even though tried to blame us for putting them in the microwave,  come on... then they want to refund and after us buying a dozen of them to count how many we touch so they will give back just that....Not worth the trouble to go there, there's nothing fresh,  not consistently and for sure they put that fake smile until you complain about something,  then you'll have the other face of the business.  The prices are crazy high for the quality and the service. I wish it would be different so people who really know better about the Argentinian culture could have a place to get a treat from of the real Argentinian cuisine, not from this fake place.
Excelente servicio las chicas súper amables en especial la niña cubana,disculpe se me escapa el nombre 🤗
Excelente atención al cliente y la comida deliciosa,si buscas empanadas frescas y que no sean fritas,este es el lugar perfecto!!! Excelente trabajo!!!

unique style and great service.

a great option of sweet bakery and traditional Argentina bakery
great food and very nice staff!
I just love this place. I am working my way through the menu. They make you feel like family. Try something new

Went here on a whim and absolutely loved it! Staff was very friendly and the food was amazing. The chicken empanadas were incredible and their chimichurri is unique. The sandwiches are large and the store (and bathroom) was very clean.

This is an amazing place to get a bite to eat. Walking in the door you are hit with the wonderful smells of the amazing food and the warm, welcoming smiles of the staff. I'm already looking forward to coming back.

Amazingly authentic. My wife is from Argentina and is so thrilled that I found Elena's. If you love authentic Argentinean food,  you have to come here.  If you love great food and pastries, this is a must visit restaurant.
The only way to regret Elena's,  is if you don't stop in. You owe it to yourself to try it for yourself.
Great place in town. The pastries and empanadas are great. I highly recommend canelones and the beef soup.
Great food and service!!

What a great hidden gem. We were looking for empanadas and this quaint little cafe had some amazingly delicious options. We were delighted to find a great selection of fresh baked goods, too! We will definitely be back.

review_questions.Parking options: Free parking lot, Free street parking, Free parking garage

reviews_data.review_text: Been here several times. Have never been disappointed. Their pastries are out of this world.
El servio y la comida de esta cafetería es simplemente excepcional! Gracias Leo por tomar su tiempo y explicarnos todo su menú. Estaremos volviendo!
This little gem is an absolute must try!  Food is delicious and the staff are amazing.

Me and my daughter came in around 3 in the afternoon and got waited on quickly and we got our food within around 15 mintues, but the food was not good. We got fettucini alfredo with chicken and the noodles were over cooked and the amount we got was not a lot, it looked like a childs fettucini and for  you have to pay which was around $18 after tax its not worth it. I reccommend if you want a good amount of food for around the same price go to gerogios in cramerton nc they give a good amount and the food is cooked all the way through and is piping hot. We also ordered sweet teas with our meals and did not get refills. Overall the food was not good and it is not worth what you end up paying for. After me and my daughter ate we both felt sick afterwards.
Food was excellent. Kind of like Italian then up a notch. Empanadas were excellent also.
En general muy muy bueno

Elena's Argentinian Cafe feels like a warm hug from the moment you step inside. Honestly, it's such a gem! Everyone is just the sweetest, most helpful people you could ever meet. They make you feel right at home, that genuine warmth truly shines through in every interaction.
And the food! It's consistently incredible. I've tried so many things on the menu, and literally everything I've had has been absolutely delicious. You can tell there's so much love and care put into everything. If you're looking for amazing food served with a side of true hospitality and a cozy, homey vibe, Elena's is definitely the place to be!

It was my first time coming here I was near the area taking care of some things for work. The staff were extremely friendly and helpful. I didn't feel rushed or pressed to order. I couldn't pronounce half of the menu but they were warm-hearted and explained what things were. I got empanadas, pistachio pastry, and Peach Cajeta. Everything was flavorful with good texture. The venue was small but cozy. The prices we're good so I could get multiple items without going over budget. I would definitely go again and try some different food. Definitely recommend!!

Me and my husband just discovered this place and love it. It's so cozy and warm inside. The menu items are always delicious and fresh. The prices are very fair. The best part is the bakery and coffee shop. Gorgeous bakery items to eat or give as a gift. The service is some of the best in Gastonia. After you eat you can walk downtown and sit in a courtyard across the street. We are now regulars.
I love this place!! They did an amazing job for my birthday cake. It was delicious and very fairly priced. This spot is a staple for me on saturday mornings.
Delicious Empanadas! Had a variety and all baked in their homemade dough crust!
Amazing food amazing pastries they make their own fresh pasta really can't say enough about this place and it's absolutely fabulous staff is amazing
So gratification 💯🙏

Fantastic and authentic Argentinian food.

You must come here and enjoy some great treats and Argentina sandwiches!

If I could give them more stars I would. I went today for the first time. The food was amazing, and I bought 4 pastries to bring home. The ladies working there was super sweet and even taught me how to pronounce the items I wanted to order. That kind of service and friendly atmosphere is worth it's weight in gold. Do yourself a favor and go eat there. You will not be sorry. This Cafe is a true gem!
Cute, clean little place. Service was excellent. We had several dishes, all were delicious. This is certainly a gem.

Stopped by this morning with my wife and a friend for breakfast. We explained it was our first time here and the lady did an amazing job breaking down the menu & pastries. We had their signature coffee with a bacon egg and cheese sandwich. The bread was made in house and was delicious. We also had the brunch potatoes and were amazing. The pastry’s were amazing and not overly sweet. This place is highly recommended. The staff members were very friendly and helpful.
Una súper experiencia…
This place is 100/10!!! The service is amazing and the food was great. I will definitely come back and hope that others have the chance to try new food and support small businesses!

I’ve been to Elena’s twice now and cannot wait until the next time. The customer service is excellent, the pastries are absolutely amazing. The coffee was excellent, and so were the three different empanadas we had!! This shop is quickly turning into a regular stop for me, I can’t wait to try more of their menu, they have so much!
Delicious, delightful, friendly, and warm. I am SO going back as often as possible! The best place we've found to get a cup of good coffee, a yummy pastry, and a little quiet time together.
Great place. Fresh homemade food and pastries. Loved it.

I bring my grandfather here and we both love it. Everyone is very friendly. :)
Tiramisu is really good.
Nothing fancy, but staff are super nice. Empanadas were really good!

This is such a cute little cafe downtown! I got the chicken empanadas, a tiramisu and the dulce de leche coffee. Everything was delicious and flavorful! Very much comfort food. The atmosphere was cute, too, I loved all the greenery and the seating areas near the front. Highly recommend and will be back!!
Un lugar bien acogedor se siente una armonía , excelente para estar en familia o solo , delicioso

Delicious empanadas and scrumptious desserts. The hardest part is choosing. I've never had flan before but will definitely eat their flan again. I've visited a few times now and the food and friendly knowledgeable staff have always delighted. I hope Elena's sticks around for a long time!

Food was expensive, service was lacking, randomly charged for extra things without asking first, upsized drinks without us asking and charged for it, food was cold and low quality (made some of us sick), missing items (which was corrected at least), said one price for something but then charged us more afterwards. This place was just not good at all in this one instance

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: Pretty solid argentinian restaurant!! We went to try some pastries and the service was phenomenal ❤️ also the pastries were really really good!! We are excited to come back soon to try the milanesas
soooooo delicious and so many different things to try you can’t just come here once! very kind and attentive staff! COME TRY ELENA’S!!!!!! 10/10
I love Elena’s Argentinian cafe. This is my first time here, and now I’ve decided I’m never leaving!!! I love it here❤️Food is so so good
I got a grilled chicken sandwich, delicious!
We love this place, great food and atmosphere!!!
Best Pizza EVER! Empanadas are great too! Great service.
Amazing! Everything was delicious and the portions were huge. Unfortunately, I don't remember the names of anything.

This is a family owned and operated restaurant with some amazingly delicious pastries! But much to my surprise the dinner menu is amazing with the best lasagna I’ve had. I was in town helping my sister that was battling Lung cancer and they would accommodate me with puréeing the carbonara soup so she could eat it. It was amazing and delicious and that was one of the last few things she had before she passed.We love them so much that whenever I’m in town I try to get them to move their business to Knoxville Tennessee. Sorry it took me so long to review this hidden gem. Can’t wait till February when planning on a visit to Gastonia

Wonderful gem in Gastonia. The coffee was perfect and the empanadas were delicious! We had one pastry that was so fresh and sweet. We ordered empanadas and soup to go and wished we had ordered more. We will certainly be back again. The staff were very friendly and made us feel so welcomed. Loved it!!!

The atmosphere was wonderfully festive, thanks to the beautiful Christmas decorations. The entire staff was incredibly nice and helpful to my group of coworkers, making the experience truly enjoyable. And most importantly, the food was absolutely great. Highly recommend checking out this local gem!

I stopped in for breakfast, my first visit.
The recommended omelette sandwich was absolutely great. I definitely will be coming back.
great food and atmosphere really enjoyed

1st time here. Called ahead, waitress was friendly and accommodating. Space was very festive but warm and inviting. Also my first time trying authentic Tres Leches and It didn’t disappoint. Me and the kids plan to return to try the fettuccine Alfredo (chicken), which I’m looking forward to. Recommend trying

Fantastic place to travel to Argentina via its incredible cuisine, people and pastries. Affordable, delicious home made ingredients from the empanada dough to the milanesas.... and the alfajores! Elena's family themselves prepare your meals and serve them with pride and staple gaucho warmth. We can't recommend them highly enough... And did i mention they cater too?????
As one small business owner to another, I loved the atmosphere, the attention the owner paid to everyone there, and the food was delightful!
1st time. Had the lasagna it even came with complimentary garlic bread. Everything was delicious and reasonably priced

Went in on Tuesday to ask about ordering a tres leche cake for the next day. They easily accommodated me! Not only is the cake beautiful to look at, it was delicious and everyone at the party raved about it! Will definitely be stopping by more often to try all the other food they offer. Highly recommend ❤️
Lo máximo la comida riquísima la atención de lo mejor lo recomiendo mucho por favor pasen y disfruten se los aseguro no se arrepentirán gracias
I love this place! Everything that I've tried has been amazing!
super cute, had a nice selection of pastries

The service and food here is top notch. I come to Elena’s any time I’m in the area and it never disappoints. The Tiramisu is some of the best I’ve ever had. The staff is very friendly and helpful. I’ll keep coming back.

Absolutely loved this Argentinian café! The empanadas are beyond delicious — perfectly seasoned and full of authentic flavor. The pan casero con chicharrón instantly brought back memories from my childhood; it tasted just like home. The music and atmosphere make you feel like you’ve stepped right into Argentina, and the service is so kind and welcoming. A perfect spot to enjoy great food and warm vibes — can’t wait to come back! 🇦🇷☕️🥟
The food is absolutely amazing.  The Beef Milanese is so tender.  The food was perfecr.

Elena's is the best!! They catered the desserts for our wedding, including an tiramisu for our wedding cake. They provided mini tiramisus for our guests-- as well as alfajores, facturas, and pastaflores-- and even delivered to our venue. All of the desserts tasted incredible and were beautiful. Our guests loved them! It was so special for us to serve authentic Argentinean desserts at our wedding while supporting a local family business!
Excelente servicio

Great service,  delicious food. The nicest people will give you great service and create a very friendly atmosphere. The homemade empanadas are great, also had a Milanesa a la Napolitana which was very good too. Will definitely be back.
I’m very impressed by the quality of food and kindness of the staff!

The staff was very nice and patient. They gave us suggestions on what to try. We decided to get a few different pastries to take home. All were delicious and you can't beat the prices. The place looked pleasant and clean.

Wouldn't or couldn't answer questions about coffee styles. Waitress was rude when asked questions. We were given to-go cups without an option for glass. No outside outlets. An unfortunate first impression.

At some point I conformed with certain flavors and meals from Gastonia, Charlotte, and even Bessemer City. And because Gastonia is exponentially growing, I was drawn away from downtown. But because of the Gastonia Fall Festival, I decided to give Elena's a try...
AND BOI WAS EVERY BITE A TASTEBUD AWAKENING. I tried their Lomito Argentino and it was by far the best sandwich I've had. My sister ordered the Fettuccini Alfredo w/ Chicken and when I say I have been HUNTING for this kind of alfredo flavor... my goodness. And the cherry on top, their flan with dulce de leche brought out "mmm"s with every bite.
I've thought of Elena's too much afterwards and have chosen it as my weekly-rewarding spot 🤤

This is a hidden gem in Gastonia!  We tried a variety of the pastries, and each was delicious! 😋 The staff is super friendly and enjoy describing their menu to to you. If you have a chance, please visit this amazing cafe. You will not be disappointed.

Todo super bien
Todo muy bueno

Good food, specially baked treats.
Authentic Argentinan food.
Chimichurrisaksa so good.
Empanadas are delicious.
My favorite spinach and cheese empanada.
The best place to enjoy something different,  empanadas, soups, pastry,  etc. All is more than good, I'll go more often.

Such a nice little cafe. The environment is so aesthetic. The pastries are INSANE!!!! SOOOO GOOD! the service is amazing, Michelle was so sweet, and the young girl in the cash registry was also super sweet. I loved this place, the location, cleanness, decor, everything is lovely.  I will definitely go back ❤️
Excellent service. Food was quick, fresh and delicious. Perfect for an hour lunch in beautiful downtown Gastonia. Will definitely not be my last time enjoying the delicious menu.

Recientemente visite esta panaderia..excelentes las muchachas que ahí trabajan ..muy amables..el postre caja delicioso los sándwich de migas super ricos..lo único que no nos gustó es que el capuchino se sirve el vaso de vidrio y caliente...si vuelvo a visitar este local ?claramente que SI sin duda......Magnolia de charlotte
Such a cute little spot in downtown Gastonia with the best tiramisu I have ever tried. Got to watch a stand up comedy show while we were there that was absolutely gut busting! 10/10 recommend
First time ever trying Argentinian food. I’ve never been so pleasantly surprised. I ordered the Lomito Argentino and a ham and cheese empanada. The food was so delicious!

The staff was very attentive and even offered to put something on TV to distract my very fussy, tired toddler. I have not had similar food since leaving Miami and it was a very pleasant surprise. I'm just sad that it's too far from SC to eat more often.
Great food. Nice place .

Food was delicious. The empanadas were fantastic. These are made from a wheat flour instead of corn.  The beef was traditional with boiled egg and olive. Also tried several pastries that were all great. The chocolate alfajores were amazing.
Que Señor los bendiga a todos soy muy amable y Cariñoso y también las comidas y su dulce soy muy delicioso ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️
This restaurant was
Wonderful people with delicious baked Goods.
A large selection of pastries! Good food

The food was awsome empanadas really good the coffee was great you need to come by and try we drove a hour and a half too try it and it was well worth it. Had brunch and took some food home !! Incredible
Canalones and empanadas  and brunch potatoes were fantastic!! Bought some of the pastries all of them were terrific. And Michele was great, very friendly.
Amazing desserts
Great place for eat love it

reviews_data.review_text: Great place to enjoy a cup of coffee as well as a whole meal, we had the empanadas beef and chicken with the broccoli cream soup they both were amazing with the chimichurri, you must try the dessert and sweet treats. Will definitely come back.
Rico todo

Visitamos por primera vez Elena’S Argentinian Café en Julio de 2025 y nos gustó mucho la comida, en este caso empanada de carne y un lomito, ambos platos muy deliciosos, nos atendieron rápido y fueron muy cordiales, lo estamos recomendando a familia y amigos porque sabemos que también lo van a disfrutar. Luego elegimos facturas, alfajores de maicena y sándwiches de miga para llevar.
Excellent food and I am from Argentina so I know!  The empanadas are amazing and pricing is super!
Excelente servicio y la comida muy deliciosa. 100% recomendado.

First time in, we were kinda ignored at the register. When our order was taken and asked about drinks, we were brought a soda can, when asked for a glass with ice, I was brought a plastic cup with ice and a lid. (No refills) I Ordered a pastry to try while waiting for our meal, and they completely forgot with only one other table to wait on besides ours.

We ordered Fetticine Alfredo as our pasta, and they later came back to tell us they didn't have any, we were offered spaghetti noodles to susbstitute. The noodles were very mushy and not enough sauce was given.

The ladies were friendly and nice but I guess the food was just not for us.

Ordered three empanadas, fettuccine Alfredo with chicken and a side salad. They make fresh pasta. It was good, a little overcooked but nice flavor. Chicken was good too. The side salad was good.
The empanadas; I've searched for and eaten empanadas from restaurants and home made. Most are solamente meat. These took more time and effort and it shows. Fresh ingredients added very tasty. First time with chimichurri, I'm sold!
Great
Excelente atención. La comida es divina y fresca. Volveré y con toda mi familia.

One of those spots where you rarely order the same thing twice because EVERYTHING on the menu is so good! The empanadas, Caesar salad, soups, sandwiches, pizza and all the desserts. keep us coming back! 10 out of 10!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Lindsay, Thank you so much for your review !!
reviews_data.review_text: If I could give more stars than 5, I would! Their empanadas and desserts are AMAZING!!!! The vibes are also very welcoming!
Pastry, dessert, and coffee cafe with chicken and steak sandwiches,  empanadas, Argentine pizza and many pasta options (and breakfest options before 12 noon). Freshly baked breads with all items.
Excellent food! Worth every penny
Cafe gives a relaxing ambiance with great customer service. Delicious pastry at an affordable price!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for your review we are so happy you enjoyed everything!
reviews_data.review_text: Excellent Food and dessert was very delicious!!!

This is an amazing place to eat!!  Atmosphere is the best!  Owners te extremely humble and friendly.
I cannot recommend enough this beautiful restaurant.

We drove an hour to get there for typical Argentine food. The Lomito Argentino is a must in my opinion and you can’t leave without taking a few pastries. The staff was very friendly and offered great service. Looking forward to going again for the Argentine Pizza.
This place is amazing a little hidden gem in gastonia, food and service is amazing

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hey Darlene, Thank you so much for your review!
reviews_data.review_text: Loved the tiramisu, delicious
Super delicious food! Love their empanadas and had a really great Milanese!
Delicious 😋

I absolutely love this restaurant! Michelle and Sabrina are always a delight and their family food and treats are delicious. The Argentinian specialty pie is a must in my opinion with the delicious chimichurri sauce!

First time going just to try something new, and it didn't disappoint. We ordered 2 dozens of their delicious pastries, and trust me ,they were good. They have a lot of great choices, some fill with dulce leche, Nutella i believe and many more. Do yourself a favor and try this new spot in Gastonia.

Para mis latinos que quieren probar algo diferente en el area , tienen que ir a Elena's.  Los postres estan deliciosos y tienen de todo tipo variedad.  Pudimos probar las empanada de carne y estaban ricos, tienen un parecido alo pastelillo de carne como les decimos en el area oeste de PR. Darse la vuelta y pruebanlo, les va encantar.
Love this place
Great cafe in downtown Gastonia. Great coffee and food!
Great spot for breakfast or sweets. Wonderful service and clean, inviting space.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Justin, thank you for your review and we are thrilled to have you as a loyal customer!
reviews_data.review_text: I stop at Elena's every time I visit Gastonia, and every time it is exceptional.  A small gem for the city's downtown.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for your review!
reviews_data.review_text: Very delicious!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hola Pedro, gracias por su review!

reviews_data.review_text: Excelente todo en este lugar, la comida, los dulces, las bebidas, todo recién echo, y la atención fue espectacular 😍

reviews_data.review_text: Great place ,the empanadas are awesome and all the Pastries   are delicious!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Thomas, thank you for your review!
reviews_data.review_text: Awesome food and service!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Tony, thank you so much for the review! We can't wait for you and your wife to come back and visit!
reviews_data.review_text: The food was delicious and the service was great! The spinach and cheese empanadas are amazing as are the pastries. I don't think you can go wrong with any of them. I also tried the lomito and had coffee. Everything was top notch. My wife and I will be back.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Salameh, I apologize for us being closed and I know that must have been frustrating for you. Our normal operating hours are from 9am to 9pm Monday through Saturday and are closed on Sundays. I hope you give us another chance!
reviews_data.review_text: Drove 15 minutes. Arrived at 4:18 and they were closed. smh

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Brittney, thank you for the review and we are so happy you liked our empanadas and pastries! They are all made from scratch daily in our kitchen!
reviews_data.review_text: Some of the best empanadas I’ve ever had! Delicious pastries as well.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi April, thank you for the kind words! We are so happy to have you as one of our loyal customers and can't wait for you to come back and try more of our items!
reviews_data.review_text: We stopped by for a coffee and to have a new food adventure.  Everything we tried (empanada, breakfast sandwich, guava pastry and coffee) was fabulous!  I was going gaga over a dessert they were putting on display and the owner, kindly, gave me one to try for my next dinner party.  I got home and took a bite.  It was so delicious!  I can't wait to serve it (it was carmelized peaches, with thin layers of cake, whipped cream and meringue crumbles).  To top it off, everyone was so kind and welcoming.  We will definitely make this a regular stop.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hola Lydia, gracias por tu review! ¡Estamos ansiosos por que regreses y nos pruebes nuevamente!
reviews_data.review_text: Excelente servicio! Exquisito el Cafe, la empanadas de brocoli y queso acabaditas de hacer. Las medias lunas, el alfajore de miel en fin todo muy rico! Buen ambiente! Cuando regrese a Gastonia volvere! Lo recomiendo!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Sonny, thank you for your beautiful words and wonderful review! As a small mom and pop shop that just opened they truly mean a lot!
reviews_data.review_text:
Elena’s

I had the opportunity to visit this Hometown feel of Gastonia, North Carolina . What a pleasant visit it was greeted by a very enthusiastic and knowledgeable staff employee named Natalie.
She proceeded to tell me more about the culture of the Argentinian way and the various foods and delicacies of the country that is so warming and welcome. Her story of how she knew the owners is a very testament of what God can do in a person‘s life to be the light and path, an example to all of us.
Although I had the latte, it was very delicious and I knew the food would be excellent in this quaint town of diversity.

Thank you, Natalie for sharing your heart and desire with others on the Argentina road to health.
Try it out and experience the Atmosphere and Warmth of
the Argentinian Road..

Sonny

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Andrew, thank you for your review! The dough for the empanadas are also made from scratch in our kitchen so we are so thrilled that you liked them! We appreciate you mentioning that our cafe reminds you of Buenos Aires as we wanted to bring our culture to this beautiful town of Gastonia!
reviews_data.review_text:
We visited for the first time on Saturday.  The empanadas were great.  We bought a dozen and took home 8 to cook later.  The dough was flakey and light. Each type was a different shape.   It is hard to make them cheaper, certainly they would not be as authentic and good because of the dough, at home.

Beautiful pastries and cakes. We had tiramisu. Enjoyed the coffee with dessert.  Excellent!  A lot of love goes into the food.

The ceiling tiles and building reminds me of some of the places I went into in Buenos Aires.

A big shout out to Sabrina who added to our enjoyment by telling us a lot about the food,  restaurant and Elana.

We will go back to try some other Argentina specialties in the near future.

It is a great place for dessert and coffee if you don't want to make it a full meal.

Any adult beverages are BYOB.  That is ok. The licenses are pricey.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Gwendolyn, thank you for your review and we can't wait for your to come back and try more of our freshly made pastries!

reviews_data.review_text: Let me begin by thanking Michelle and Sabrina. So welcoming! I had the spaghetti and meatballs(3 meaty) Sabrina mentioned that the sauce was homemade, and that it was delicious 😋 👌 indeed! I'm always worry about homemade sauce but, the chef was on point. I also ordered their ham&cheese empanada. Let me tell you, that empanada would fill you up, so if you are not really hungry but still want protein, get an empanada. The food was fresh, the cortadito( strong 💪 ☕️ was delicious, so not add extra sugar) So, Elena's has earned my business, keep the food fresh, the staff friendly, and I can't wait the keep trying everything in the menu. They do have pastries, they look good but I'm watching my weight 😁. By the way, this is an Argentinean  restaurant. Elena's is in the middle of downtown Gastonia. Good location, good for dates and family. I hope they stay around! I will add pics of what I had, the before and after.

EXCITING

To have Argentinian treats in this area!
It’s worth the visit. Great location, parking options, and enough seating options inside also.

The food is good, I feel like overtime it will continue to improve in every area: pastries, savory items, service, atmosphere (play some tango) and for that, they need your support.
Please visit and try it!

Also they have a mini Mercado with Yerba mate, Dulce de leche and Argentinian species.

reviews_data.review_text: Delicious baked goods, friendly and energetic staff. They were happy to explain and suggest their wide assortment of goodies. ❤️ We will definitely be back for more!
This is another cute addition to the downtown area! The empanadas were 😋. My favorite is the beef. Our kids loved the dessert options as well.

Absolutely delicious desserts, best tiramisu I have ever eaten! Going back for sure to try the food as well.

Thank you so much! I will be back with friends and family. By the way, we got empanadas, faturas, alfajores and sándwiches de miga.

the lomito was so friggen tuff boi it really hit the spot

This place is an absolute gem! I went for coffee and tres leches cake.Both were fabulous. I'll definitely be back soon!
Fair prices, kind staff, and very, very delicious food. Unfortunately just passing through, but I will carry the sweet sweet savory memory of that flaky spinach and cheese empanada with me always.
🔥 - Just go.  You won't regret it.

The food is delicious, fresh and looks beautiful.
service is 100% perfect.

Best tiramisu ever
EXCELENTE!  Go give them a try! El café con Leche, las empanadas, their pastries, etc.......EXCELENTE!
Good food ❤️ love !

The young ladies working there were very attentive  and informative to our questions, while waiting on us. Black tea was hot brewed, my wife had a Diet Coke. The food was great and prices were comparable to other establishments. Dessert was great and they have many pastries to choose from. Took a few home for later. Enjoyed our evening and the time we had to talk with them. We’re going to go there again. Been open for four weeks and I hope they’ll thrive uptown. I’ll recommend them to anyone.

Excelente ! Buena atención , y comida muy rica 🎉
Absolutely amazing! The facturas are huge and taste soo good! I am so glad to have a place like this close by.

We stopped at Elena’s Argentinian Café to celebrate my son’s birthday, and he absolutely loved it! He had the lomito (definitely a must-try) and it was delicious!

I went for the pastaflora, honey alfajores, a latte, and the beef empanadas. Everything was so tasty, especially the empanadas — perfectly crispy and full of flavor.

We also grabbed a few treats to take home for the birthday party, and they were a hit! Can’t wait to come back again soon.

Had the corn soup.  My DIL had the broccoli soup. Both delicious and a healthy portion.
My DIL ordered the chicken empanadas.
AMAZING!!! I will be going back
Is about time. Finally  we got a place with delicious food.
The deserta are so delicious, I loved them so much, probably would order a cake from here, for a birthday.

Lomito es muy rico, empanadas tambien.

The girl who helped me today (I didn't get her name) was incredibly friendly! She had a smile that never faded! I asked her what the pastry was that I ultimately bought (I've uploaded a picture), and she told me the name and gave me a description of it that made it impossible to pass on! Unfortunately I've forgotten what it was called (in my defense, I'm painfully Caucasian so the name went in one ear and out the other). The coffee was also delicious! And the prices are incredibly great for the quality! There are tables that you can sit at if you choose to eat in, and the shop is quiet and welcoming! I will absolutely be going back time and time again! Everything in there looks delicious!
Enjoyed the pastries they had an assortment of desserts and everything i had was delicious. Got the Milanese sandwich and it was delicious.
Food and service was amazing!

reviews_data.review_text: I drive from Lenoir to dine here.  The staff is extremely friendly and I always feel welcomed.  Food is great and the pastries are delicious, especially with a cup of their coffee.  Relaxing atmosphere for conversation with friends or just time on your computer.

Also has their breakfast sandwiches, and it's so good! And for a big, decent size too!

Last but not least, the staff are awesome! They greet you and make you feel like you're right at home. Super helpful and friendly! I really appreciate that! Never had an issue. 🤗 My mornings are so much better going here.

reviews_data.review_text: Amazing spacious cafe! BUT very hard parking and I went on a Tuesday! The latte was watery for both me and my sister’s latte but I blame it on the barista putting the shot after the ice. The espresso is very strong! We got the beef empanada and it was very fresh and hot! We will be coming back again to support a small business even though it’s a bit pricy.
Truly the best - Empanadas and soup are my go to.  But if they have any Guava pastries, you have to try those too!
awesome South American pastries. Alfajores was incredible.

I have tried so many things from this Cafe and I have not been disappointed once!
4/8/26 update:
I eloped this week and knew I could count Elena's to have good food and a good cake or pastry. I brought 4 out of the 6 people with me had never been. They loved the food and the prices.  One friend kept ordering pastries 🤣 my now husband and I had a delicious little cake for our little wedding cake ❤️ thank you to your staff for being so sweet.
Great place for lunch and just to sit down for coffe.
Excellent place to try Argentine food!

I wish  people understand  that there's nothing authentic argentinian about this  place. I've been married to a beautiful Argentinian  woman and have the pleasure to visit and know people who really cook and know the Argentinian food.  We tried this Elena's place couple of times, the food is not fresh, the prices are crazy and the service  is terrible.  We just give it a try  this week  and the sandwiches of miga are old ,not fresh and for sure not made on the spot like they advertised they do, on top of that after calling and complaining,  they argued about why they felt and tasted like that, even though tried to blame us for putting them in the microwave,  come on... then they want to refund and after us buying a dozen of them to count how many we touch so they will give back just that....Not worth the trouble to go there, there's nothing fresh,  not consistently and for sure they put that fake smile until you complain about something,  then you'll have the other face of the business.  The prices are crazy high for the quality and the service. I wish it would be different so people who really know better about the Argentinian culture could have a place to get a treat from of the real Argentinian cuisine, not from this fake place.
Excelente servicio las chicas súper amables en especial la niña cubana,disculpe se me escapa el nombre 🤗
Excelente atención al cliente y la comida deliciosa,si buscas empanadas frescas y que no sean fritas,este es el lugar perfecto!!! Excelente trabajo!!!

unique style and great service.

a great option of sweet bakery and traditional Argentina bakery
great food and very nice staff!
I just love this place. I am working my way through the menu. They make you feel like family. Try something new

Went here on a whim and absolutely loved it! Staff was very friendly and the food was amazing. The chicken empanadas were incredible and their chimichurri is unique. The sandwiches are large and the store (and bathroom) was very clean.

This is an amazing place to get a bite to eat. Walking in the door you are hit with the wonderful smells of the amazing food and the warm, welcoming smiles of the staff. I'm already looking forward to coming back.

Amazingly authentic. My wife is from Argentina and is so thrilled that I found Elena's. If you love authentic Argentinean food,  you have to come here.  If you love great food and pastries, this is a must visit restaurant.
The only way to regret Elena's,  is if you don't stop in. You owe it to yourself to try it for yourself.
Great place in town. The pastries and empanadas are great. I highly recommend canelones and the beef soup.
Great food and service!!

What a great hidden gem. We were looking for empanadas and this quaint little cafe had some amazingly delicious options. We were delighted to find a great selection of fresh baked goods, too! We will definitely be back.

reviews_data.review_text: Been here several times. Have never been disappointed. Their pastries are out of this world.
El servio y la comida de esta cafetería es simplemente excepcional! Gracias Leo por tomar su tiempo y explicarnos todo su menú. Estaremos volviendo!
This little gem is an absolute must try!  Food is delicious and the staff are amazing.

Me and my daughter came in around 3 in the afternoon and got waited on quickly and we got our food within around 15 mintues, but the food was not good. We got fettucini alfredo with chicken and the noodles were over cooked and the amount we got was not a lot, it looked like a childs fettucini and for  you have to pay which was around $18 after tax its not worth it. I reccommend if you want a good amount of food for around the same price go to gerogios in cramerton nc they give a good amount and the food is cooked all the way through and is piping hot. We also ordered sweet teas with our meals and did not get refills. Overall the food was not good and it is not worth what you end up paying for. After me and my daughter ate we both felt sick afterwards.
Food was excellent. Kind of like Italian then up a notch. Empanadas were excellent also.
En general muy muy bueno

Elena's Argentinian Cafe feels like a warm hug from the moment you step inside. Honestly, it's such a gem! Everyone is just the sweetest, most helpful people you could ever meet. They make you feel right at home, that genuine warmth truly shines through in every interaction.
And the food! It's consistently incredible. I've tried so many things on the menu, and literally everything I've had has been absolutely delicious. You can tell there's so much love and care put into everything. If you're looking for amazing food served with a side of true hospitality and a cozy, homey vibe, Elena's is definitely the place to be!

It was my first time coming here I was near the area taking care of some things for work. The staff were extremely friendly and helpful. I didn't feel rushed or pressed to order. I couldn't pronounce half of the menu but they were warm-hearted and explained what things were. I got empanadas, pistachio pastry, and Peach Cajeta. Everything was flavorful with good texture. The venue was small but cozy. The prices we're good so I could get multiple items without going over budget. I would definitely go again and try some different food. Definitely recommend!!

Me and my husband just discovered this place and love it. It's so cozy and warm inside. The menu items are always delicious and fresh. The prices are very fair. The best part is the bakery and coffee shop. Gorgeous bakery items to eat or give as a gift. The service is some of the best in Gastonia. After you eat you can walk downtown and sit in a courtyard across the street. We are now regulars.
I love this place!! They did an amazing job for my birthday cake. It was delicious and very fairly priced. This spot is a staple for me on saturday mornings.
Delicious Empanadas! Had a variety and all baked in their homemade dough crust!
Amazing food amazing pastries they make their own fresh pasta really can't say enough about this place and it's absolutely fabulous staff is amazing
So gratification 💯🙏

Fantastic and authentic Argentinian food.

You must come here and enjoy some great treats and Argentina sandwiches!

If I could give them more stars I would. I went today for the first time. The food was amazing, and I bought 4 pastries to bring home. The ladies working there was super sweet and even taught me how to pronounce the items I wanted to order. That kind of service and friendly atmosphere is worth it's weight in gold. Do yourself a favor and go eat there. You will not be sorry. This Cafe is a true gem!
Cute, clean little place. Service was excellent. We had several dishes, all were delicious. This is certainly a gem.

Stopped by this morning with my wife and a friend for breakfast. We explained it was our first time here and the lady did an amazing job breaking down the menu & pastries. We had their signature coffee with a bacon egg and cheese sandwich. The bread was made in house and was delicious. We also had the brunch potatoes and were amazing. The pastry’s were amazing and not overly sweet. This place is highly recommended. The staff members were very friendly and helpful.
Una súper experiencia…
This place is 100/10!!! The service is amazing and the food was great. I will definitely come back and hope that others have the chance to try new food and support small businesses!

I’ve been to Elena’s twice now and cannot wait until the next time. The customer service is excellent, the pastries are absolutely amazing. The coffee was excellent, and so were the three different empanadas we had!! This shop is quickly turning into a regular stop for me, I can’t wait to try more of their menu, they have so much!
Delicious, delightful, friendly, and warm. I am SO going back as often as possible! The best place we've found to get a cup of good coffee, a yummy pastry, and a little quiet time together.
Great place. Fresh homemade food and pastries. Loved it.

I bring my grandfather here and we both love it. Everyone is very friendly. :)
Tiramisu is really good.
Nothing fancy, but staff are super nice. Empanadas were really good!

This is such a cute little cafe downtown! I got the chicken empanadas, a tiramisu and the dulce de leche coffee. Everything was delicious and flavorful! Very much comfort food. The atmosphere was cute, too, I loved all the greenery and the seating areas near the front. Highly recommend and will be back!!
Un lugar bien acogedor se siente una armonía , excelente para estar en familia o solo , delicioso

Food was expensive, service was lacking, randomly charged for extra things without asking first, upsized drinks without us asking and charged for it, food was cold and low quality (made some of us sick), missing items (which was corrected at least), said one price for something but then charged us more afterwards. This place was just not good at all in this one instance

I was in town helping my sister that was battling Lung cancer and they would accommodate me with puréeing the carbonara soup so she could eat it. It was amazing and delicious and that was one of the last few things she had before she passed.We love them so much that whenever I’m in town I try to get them to move their business to Knoxville Tennessee. Sorry it took me so long to review this hidden gem. Can’t wait till February when planning on a visit to Gastonia

Highly recommend checking out this local gem!

I stopped in for breakfast, my first visit.
The recommended omelette sandwich was absolutely great. I definitely will be coming back.
great food and atmosphere really enjoyed

1st time here. Called ahead, waitress was friendly and accommodating. Space was very festive but warm and inviting. Also my first time trying authentic Tres Leches and It didn’t disappoint. super cute, had a nice selection of pastries
